Package org.bukkit.inventory.meta.components

@Experimental package org.bukkit.inventory.meta.components
Isolated components which may form part of item meta.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.bukkit.inventory.meta
    The interfaces used when manipulating extra data can can be stored inside item stacks.
    org.bukkit.inventory.meta.components.consumable
    All classes related to the Consumable Component.
    org.bukkit.inventory.meta.tags
    Classes that allow attaching custom data to items.
    org.bukkit.inventory.meta.trim
    Armor trim meta types.
  • Class
    Description
    AttackRangeComponent
    Represents a component which dictates the attack range of the item.
    BlocksAttacksComponent
    Represents a component which can turn any item into a shield-like item which blocks attack damage.
    BlocksAttacksComponent.DamageReduction
    A damage reduction for a specific set of damage types.
    CustomModelDataComponent
    Represents a component which adds custom model data.
    EquippableComponent
    Represents a component which can turn any item into equippable armor.
    FoodComponent
    Represents a component which can handle food stats in any item.
    JukeboxPlayableComponent
    Represents a component which can be inserted into a jukebox.
    KineticWeaponComponent
    Represents a component which can turn any item into kinetic weapon that deals damage based on the relative speed of the target and attacker.
    KineticWeaponComponent.Condition
    Represents a condition for an attack effect.
    PiercingWeaponComponent
    Represents a component which can turn any item into piercing weapon that damages multiple entities.
    SwingAnimationComponent
    Represents a component which determines the animation when using this item.
    SwingAnimationComponent.Type
    The diferent types of animation.
    ToolComponent
    Represents a component which can turn any item into a tool.
    ToolComponent.ToolRule
    A rule governing use of this tool and overriding attributes per-block.
    UseCooldownComponent
    Represents a component which determines the cooldown applied to use of this item.
    UseEffectsComponent
    Represents a component which determines the attributes while using this item.
    WeaponComponent
    Represents a component which can turn any item into a weapon.
